title: BEM-1287 workflow YAML guard
objective:
Create file governance/validators/validate_governance_workflow_yaml.py with content from pathlib import Path
import sys

WORKFLOW = Path('.github/workflows/governance-validation-ci.yml')

REQUIRED_SNIPPETS = [
    'name: Governance Validation CI',
    'on:',
    'push:',
    'pull_request:',
    'jobs:',
    'runs-on: ubuntu-latest',
    'python governance/validators/validate_foundation_all.py',
    'python governance/tests/run_bem1284_minimal_governance_loop.py',
    'python governance/tests/run_bem1285_ci_e2e_capture.py',
]
FORBIDDEN_SNIPPETS = [
    "'on':",
    '"on":',
    'schedule:',
    'cron:',
]

def main():
    errors = []
    if not WORKFLOW.exists():
        errors.append('workflow file missing')
    else:
        text = WORKFLOW.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
        for snippet in REQUIRED_SNIPPETS:
            if snippet not in text:
                errors.append(f'missing required snippet: {snippet}')
        for snippet in FORBIDDEN_SNIPPETS:
            if snippet in text:
                errors.append(f'forbidden snippet present: {snippet}')
        lines = text.splitlines()
        if lines and lines[0].strip() != 'name: Governance Validation CI':
            errors.append('workflow must start with name line')
        if 'on:' not in [line.strip() for line in lines]:
            errors.append('top-level on key missing')
    if errors:
        print('FAIL workflow yaml guard')
        for error in errors:
            print(error)
        raise SystemExit(1)
    print('PASS workflow yaml guard')

if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()
Create file .github/workflows/governance-validation-ci.yml with content name: Governance Validation CI

on:
  push:
  pull_request:

jobs:
  governance_validation:
    name: Governance validation
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: "3.11"
      - name: Validate workflow YAML guard
        run: python governance/validators/validate_governance_workflow_yaml.py
      - name: Validate foundation
        run: python governance/validators/validate_foundation_all.py
      - name: Run minimal governance loop
        run: python governance/tests/run_bem1284_minimal_governance_loop.py
      - name: Run CI E2E capture
        run: python governance/tests/run_bem1285_ci_e2e_capture.py
